stemHtml: After dispatch an aircrafts integrated EFB is found to be inoperative. What is the most appropriate course of action?

options.a: Delay the flight until the EFB is operational again.
options.b: Use a backup handheld EFB provided by the operator.
options.c: Make use of paper checklists, performance calculations, and procedures.
options.d: Continue the flight without referencing performance data or checklists.
